title: Allison Kreft's New Collections Now at Two Peas
excerpt: Remember the blog post about Allison's new line with Webster's Pages and this layout? Other supplies: We Were Here stamp || Journal Thickers || Date Stamp || Scrapperin stamps . Well, her newest collections - Composition & Color and Sweet…
body:
Remember the blog post about Allison's new line with Webster's Pages and this layout?

Other supplies: We Were Here stamp || Journal Thickers || Date Stamp || Scrapperin stamps.

Well, her newest collections - Composition & Color and Sweet Notes are available online at Two Peas in A Bucket! Happy shopping!
